## Scientific integrity checklist

- [ ] I disclosed any changes to preprocessing, thresholds, routing, masks, exclusions, models, or evaluation data.
- [ ] I did not fabricate, selectively hide, or misrepresent results.
- [ ] I did not add raw AFM images or other restricted data.
- [ ] New figures, tables, masks, and metrics are traceable to source files or scripts.
- [ ] Claims are limited to the evidence included in this pull request.

## Licensing and provenance

- [ ] I have the right to submit all included code, data, figures, documentation, and model files.
- [ ] I identified and attributed adapted third-party material.
- [ ] I preserved required copyright, license, citation, and provenance notices.
- [ ] I agree that my contribution will be licensed under `AGPL-3.0-or-later`.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, private keys, confidential reviewer material, or proprietary data.

## Breaking changes

Describe any incompatible API, file-format, configuration, model, or workflow changes. Write `None` when not applicable.

## Screenshots or output examples

Add screenshots or derived output examples when they improve reviewability. Do not include restricted AFM images.
